errors.title: Error
errors.genericMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

welcome.subtitle: Have you used Zapienz before, or are you about to?
welcome.haveAccountA11y: I have an account, go to sign in

slide1.title: A safe AI environment for kids
slide1.description: Your children can explore AI in a protected space, specially designed for their age.

slide2.title: Smart parental controls
slide2.description: Set rules, define sensitive topics, and receive real-time alerts when risky situations arise.

slide3.title: Learning with guidance
slide3.description: Conversations are monitored and adapted to the child's age, promoting safe learning.

onboarding.skipA11y: Skip introduction and go to sign in
onboarding.startA11y: Get started and go to sign in

signIn.title: Welcome Back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to continue
signIn.errorInvalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.subtitle: And create a safe digital environment.
signUp.description: Enter your details. Remember that you must be of legal age to set up the app.
signUp.underageWarning: You must be at least 18 years old to use this app.
signUp.birthDateInputA11y: Date of birth input. Tap to open date picker

signUpStep2.description: Enter your email and create a secure password.
signUpStep2.helperPassword: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
signUpStep2.errorPasswordLength: Password must contain at least 8 characters.

signUpStep3.description: Create an access PIN and accept the terms and conditions.
signUpStep3.helperPin: It will be used to access your parental profile.
signUpStep3.errorTermsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions to continue.
signUpStep3.termsCheckbox: I declare that I am over 18 years old and accept the terms and conditions.
signUpStep3.errorSignupFailed: Something went wrong creating your account. Please try again.

signUpStep4.title: Identity verification
signUpStep4.subtitle: Before we start, we need to verify that you are an adult.
signUpStep4.body1: To protect the safety of children, we use a facial recognition system that confirms that the person managing the account is an adult.
signUpStep4.body2: We will take a photo of your face using the front camera. The image will be processed securely and will not be stored.
signUpStep4.body3: Make sure you have good lighting and are not wearing sunglasses.
signUpStep4.cameraButtonA11y: Allow camera access for identity verification
signUpStep4.cancelA11y: Cancel verification and go back to previous step
signUpStep4.cancelAlertMessage: If you leave now, your session will be closed. Next time you sign in, you can continue from here.

cameraVerification.step1Title: Position your face within the oval and take the photo.
cameraVerification.step2Title: Now, turn your head to the right and take the photo.
cameraVerification.step3Title: Finally, turn your head to the left and take the photo.
cameraVerification.takePhotoButtonA11y: Start countdown to take identity verification photo
cameraVerification.cameraCancelA11y: Cancel verification and go back to previous step

underage.title: Ask a grown-up for help!
underage.subtitle: Let an adult know you want to start using Zapienz!

createProfile.title: Create a profile
createProfile.subtitle: Set up your child's profile so they can start using Zapienz.
createProfile.helperBirthDate: Zapienz adapts its responses so they're easy to understand based on age.
createProfile.nextA11y: Go to the next profile setup step
createProfile.backA11y: Skip profile setup and go to home

skipAlert.title: Skip profile setup?
skipAlert.message: You can create a child profile later from the home screen.

configureAlerts.title: Configure alerts for {{name}}

infoBanner.title: How does it work?
infoBanner.description: When Zapienz detects behaviors, phrases, or feelings related to any of the configured alerts, it will send you a notification.

descriptions.selfHarm: Designed to detect signs of depression and provide early alerts about self-harm risks or suicidal thoughts.
descriptions.grooming: Designed to detect digital deception and online manipulation, alerting about grooming risks, interactions with strangers, or other critical digital conflicts.
descriptions.abuse: Detects signs of physical, emotional, or sexual abuse, and alerts about mistreatment situations in the child's environment.
descriptions.bullying: Identifies patterns of school bullying, social exclusion, and peer harassment.
descriptions.emotionalHealth: Monitors emotional well-being indicators, anxiety, stress, and significant mood changes.
descriptions.drugs: Detects mentions or interest in controlled substances, alcohol, and drugs.
descriptions.violence: Identifies content related to physical violence, threats, and aggressive behavior.
descriptions.discrimination: Detects hate speech, discrimination, and prejudice based on race, gender, orientation, or origin.
descriptions.religion: Monitors conversations about religious and spiritual topics that may require parental attention.
descriptions.emergencies: Alerts to situations requiring immediate medical or police intervention.

responseOptions.respondAndSuggest: Respond and suggest talking to an adult
responseOptions.dontRespondAndSuggest: Don't respond and suggest talking to an adult
responseOptions.emergencyResponse: In emergencies, instructs the child and informs them that adult assistance has been requested.

notificationOptions.appEmailAndPush: In-app, by email, and push notification
notificationOptions.emergencyNotification: Persistent phone notifications until read confirmation.

configureAlerts.backArrowA11y: Go back to the previous screen
configureAlerts.nextA11y: Confirm alerts and go to the next step
configureAlerts.backA11y: Go back to the previous screen

createCustomAlert.title: Create custom alert
createCustomAlert.subtitle: Define a custom topic for Zapienz to monitor.

fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what Zapienz should detect...
fields.isBlockingDescription: Zapienz won't respond to this content.
fields.notifyDescription: We'll notify you when this content is detected.

responseType.Responder y sugerir hablar con un adulto: Respond and suggest talking to an adult
responseType.No responder y sugerir hablar con un adu: Don't respond and suggest talking to an adult
responseType.Ante emergencias ayuda y avisa que se so: Emergency: help and notify an adult

notificationsSetup.title: Notifications
notificationsSetup.subtitle: Contact methods setup.
notificationsSetup.description: We will use these contact methods to send you notifications about the alerts you have configured.

fields.backupEmailHelper: It will be used to sign in to your parental profile.

pushNotifications.title: Enable push notifications on your phone.
pushNotifications.description: Notifications will be sent to your phone only for the alerts you specify.

notificationsSetup.nextA11y: Confirm notification settings and go to the next step
notificationsSetup.backA11y: Go back to the previous screen
notificationsSetup.backArrowA11y: Go back to the previous screen

profileComplete.title: All set!
profileComplete.subtitle: Profile created successfully. You can now start using Zapienz.
profileComplete.childDeviceDescription: Download Zapienz, sign in with your username and password, and select their profile.
profileComplete.parentDeviceDescription: Select their profile on the next screen. Keep in mind that alerts are paused while the child's profile is active.
profileComplete.acceptA11y: Accept and continue to the home screen
